items.title: Two Cybersecurity Professionals Get 4-Year Sentences in BlackCat Ransomware Attacks
items.summary:
The U.S. Department of Justice (DoJ) on Thursday announced the sentencing of two cybersecurity professionals to four years each in prison for their role in facilitating BlackCat ransomware attacks in 2023.
Ryan Goldberg, 40, of Georgia, and Kevin Martin, 36, of Texas, were accused of deploying the ransomware against multiple victims located throughout the U.S. between April and December 2023.

items.title: Note Jetty 12 requirement for Spring CVE-2025-41242 (#778)
items.summary:
Note Jetty 12 requirement for Spring CVE-2025-41242 (#778)

The encodePathSafeEncoding decoder that converts %u002e into %2e only
exists in jetty-util 12.0+, which spring-boot-starter-parent pulls in
starting from 3.2.0. Older Spring Boot setups (e.g. 3.1.x + Jetty 11)
cannot reproduce this chain even when the Spring side is in range, per
issue #775.
